verdict: PARTIAL — mean_gap=+27.06, |gap|/pre_sd=2.4, p_perm=1 (gap below 0.5×pre_sd or placebo p≥0.10)
verdict_reason: mean_gap=+27.06, |gap|/pre_sd=2.4, p_perm=1 (gap below 0.5×pre_sd or placebo p≥0.10)
falsification_rule_text: Not supported if any of: (a) synthetic-control estimated treatment effect on homicide rate 2022-2024 is not negative and statistically distinguishable from donor-permutation distribution at p < 0.05, OR (b) the post-2022 gap is smaller than 50% of the observed pre-to-post decline (i.e., the counterfactual donor pool also experienced substantial homicide decline), OR (c) a placebo-in-time test assigning treatment at 2019-06-01 produces a similarly large gap (indicating the decline predates régimen and is attributable to Plan Control Territorial / alleged undisclosed truce rather than mass incarceration), OR (d) the extortion- complaints secondary outcome shows no decline (indicating crime was not substantively reduced, only homicides, implying a body-disposal or reporting-manipulation confound).
